notes: Primary curated multi-study cohort for heart-failure and HFrEF interventional consent benchmarking. Excludes the observational HFrEF care study and the sleep-apnea remodeling study to keep the benchmark closer to the main consent-generation use case.

studies.notes: Phase III HFrEF dapagliflozin trial used as the main end-to-end reference case.
Completed HFrEF interventional study with a matching posted consent form.
Completed heart-failure interventional study focused on cost and shared decision-making.
Completed HFrEF interventional pharmacokinetic study with a matching posted consent form.
Recruiting heart-failure interventional study that broadens the benchmark beyond completed trials.
Heart-failure interventional study involving early ivabradine use.
Terminated HFrEF interventional study with renal-impairment context.
Completed Phase II HFrEF dose-regimen trial with posted results.
